title: [Talador Mines, Old Tunnel]
description: The walls of the tunnel are swarming with slimy, glowing white maggots that crawl along like a cascade of bright opals.  Amidst the darkness of the passage, thick cobwebs hang from the uneven ceiling.

wayto.21960: ;e waitrt?; fput 'search'; waitrt?; fput 'kneel' unless kneeling?; move 'go hole'; fput 'stand'; waitrt?
